title: BEM-787 verify runtime short
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:09 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(glob): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(glob)) if p.is_file()]
b785=load('governance/state/bem785_verify_shell_queue_processor_outcome.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
res=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
resp=files('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/*')
status='response_found' if resp else ('runtime_seen' if runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at') else ('dispatch_results_seen' if res else 'no_runtime_no_results'))
state={'bem':'BEM-787','status':status,'b785_status':b785.get('status'),'dispatch_results':res[-20:],'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'responses':resp[-20:],'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem787_verify_runtime_short.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem787_verify_runtime_short.md').write_text('# BEM-787 | Verify Runtime Short | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem787_next.md').write_text('BEM-787 next: if no_runtime_no_results, patch codex-runner queue step placement and lint. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem787_verify_runtime_short.json','governance/reports/bem787_verify_runtime_short.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem787_next.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Short verification of BEM-785 state, workflow_dispatch_results, Claude runtime state, and Claude mailbox responses')
"""
No issue comments.
